name: Vaelora
archetype: Level 11 Arcanist, aristocratic high elf slumming with mortals
speech_patterns: Speaks with elaborate formality and condescending politeness
Frequently references elven superiority and long lifespan
Pauses dramatically before delivering cutting observations
quirks: Wears silk gloves even in dungeons to avoid 'contamination'
Corrects others' grammar and pronunciation constantly
example_phrases: I have lived three human lifetimes. Your urgency is... quaint.
One supposes this 'dungeon' is adequate, by provincial standards. I've seen better ballrooms.
Do try to enunciate, dear. The Common tongue suffers enough without your... creative pronunciation.
My family's estate has servants with better breeding than most of your nobility. Present company... included.
How delightfully crude. It's like watching puppies attempt arithmetic.
